sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ رَمْزًا أَصِيلًا لِلْكَرَمِ وَالضِّيَافَةِ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعَاتِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ، حَيْثُ تُرَافِقُ الْمَجَالِسَ وَالنَّقَاشَاتِ الْهَامَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa se smatra izvornim simbolom velikodušnosti i gostoprimstva u arapskim društvima, gdje prati skupove i važne rasprave.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic coffee is considered an authentic symbol of generosity and hospitality in Arab societies, where it accompanies gatherings and important discussions.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَقْتَصِرُ إِعْدَادُهَا عَلَى غَلْيِ الْبُنِّ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ يَتَطَلَّبُ دِقَّةً فِي اخْتِيَارِ حَبَّاتِ الْهَيْلِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ لِإِضْفَاءِ نَكْهَةٍ مُمَيَّزَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Njena priprema nije ograničena samo na kuhanje kafe, već zahtijeva preciznost u odabiru zrna kardamoma i šafrana kako bi se dodao poseban ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Its preparation is not limited to just boiling the beans, but requires precision in choosing cardamom seeds and saffron to add a distinctive flavor.

sentences.arabic: يَتِمُّ تَقْدِيمُهَا فِي فَنَاجِينَ صَغِيرَةٍ، وَيُشْتَرَطُ أَنْ يُمْسِكَ الضَّيْفُ الْفِنْجَانَ بِيَدِهِ الْيُمْنَى تَعْبِيرًا عَنِ الِاحْتِرَامِ الْمُتَبَادَلِ.
sentences.translation: Poslužuje se u malim šoljicama, a uslov je da gost drži šoljicu desnom rukom kao izraz međusobnog poštovanja.
sentences.translationEn: It is served in small cups, and it is required that the guest holds the cup with their right hand as an expression of mutual respect.

sentences.arabic: غَالِبًا مَا تُصَاحِبُ هَذِهِ التَّقَالِيدَ تُمُورٌ فَاخِرَةٌ تَعْمَلُ عَلَى مُوَازَنَةِ مَرَارَةِ الْقَهْوَةِ بِحَلَاوَتِهَا الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove tradicije često prate vrhunske hurme koje svojom prirodnom slašću balansiraju gorčinu kafe.
sentences.translationEn: These traditions are often accompanied by premium dates that work to balance the bitterness of the coffee with their natural sweetness.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ طُقُوسَ الْقَهْوَةِ تَعْكِسُ عُمْقَ الرَّوَابِطِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ وَالِاعْتِزَازَ بِالْمَوْرُوثِ الثَّقَافِيِّ الَّذِي يَنْتَقِلُ عَبْرَ الْأَجْيَالِ.
sentences.translation: Rituali kafe odražavaju dubinu društvenih veza i ponos na kulturno naslijeđe koje se prenosi kroz generacije.
sentences.translationEn: Coffee rituals reflect the depth of social bonds and pride in the cultural heritage that is passed down through generations.
